diagrams.title: 4-to-2 Encoder Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the basic structure of a 4-to-2 encoder with 4 input lines and 2 output lines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding encoder basic structure and input-output relationship

diagrams.title: 4-to-2 Encoder Logic Circuit
diagrams.description: Gate-level implementation of a 4-to-2 encoder using OR gates
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how Boolean expressions translate to hardware implementation

diagrams.title: Priority Encoder with Valid Output
diagrams.description: Block diagram of a priority encoder showing the additional V output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding priority encoder structure and valid indicator functionality

diagrams.title: Encoder vs Decoder Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing inverse relationship between encoder and decoder
elements: Left: Encoder (4→2) converting multiple inputs to fewer outputs
Right: Decoder (2→4) converting fewer inputs to multiple outputs
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the complementary nature of encoders and decoders
